KHAS RTS Students Win First Prize at the 6th IKSV Meetings on the Bridge Short Film Workshop

Özgür Utku Aslan and Oğuz Kaan Tuygun, 4th year students of the Department of Radio, TV and Cinema, won the first prize at the 6th Meetings on the Bridge Short Film Workshop organized by İKSV with their project “Seagull”.

The workshops were held at the Cinematheque/Cinema House between November 2-11 to support filmmakers in developing their projects and films. “Seagull”, selected at the end of the workshops, won the prize worth 10.000 TL.

We congratulate our professors and students of the Department of Radio, Television and Cinema and wish them continued success.
